caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt, a grey baseball cap, and black over-ear headphones is speaking into a professional condenser microphone. The microphone is mounted on a black boom arm and features the text "BlueBird" and "Blue Microphones" on its body. He is positioned against a backdrop of dark grey, ribbed acoustic foam panels. The man has a tattoo on his right upper arm and is gesturing with his right hand as he speaks. Across the sequence, he maintains a consistent position, though his facial expression shifts slightly and his mouth opens and closes as he talks. The lighting is soft, focusing on the subject and the recording equipment, creating a studio environment dedicated to audio recording.
